name: Clockwork Doppelgänger Customs
description: Record three dense pointer-and-action loops, phase their looping ghosts on one master timeline, and synchronize physical catch, handoff, stamp, and final passport delivery.
natural_language: Build a working verification line from recordings of your own actions.

metadata.notes: Original procedural customs conveyor. Client render state necessarily contains station geometry and loop schedules, but no successful phase solution is rendered; dense takes, fixed-time ghosts, possession, handoffs, stamp, and delivery are independently replayed.
